prompt: A high-end fashion studio portrait of a young woman with fair skin and dark brown hair styled in a sleek high bun, crouching in a compact pose with her knees drawn close to her chest. She is looking directly into the camera with a calm, confident, neutral expression. She wears a cream-colored strapless sweetheart-neckline top, loose-fitting beige suede or linen trousers, and glossy dark chocolate-brown pointed-toe slingback stiletto heels. One hand rests lightly on her shoe while the other touches the floor. Soft, diffused studio lighting creates smooth skin tones and subtle shadows. Minimalist light gray seamless background with a clean editorial aesthetic. Neutral earth-tone color palette, luxury fashion campaign style, photorealistic, ultra-detailed skin texture, natural makeup, sharp focus, medium-full body composition, 85mm lens, f/4, high-resolution, premium magazine photography.

promptZh: 一张高端时尚摄影棚人像，主体为 一位皮肤白皙、深棕色头发梳成利落高发髻的年轻女性，她以紧凑的姿势蹲着，双膝紧贴胸前。她直视镜头，表情冷静、自信且中性。她身穿 一件奶油色抹胸甜心领上衣，搭配宽松的米色麂皮或亚麻长裤，以及一双亮面深巧克力棕色尖头露跟细高跟鞋。一只手轻轻搭在鞋上，另一只手触碰地面。柔和的漫射摄影棚灯光营造出平滑的肤色和细腻的阴影。极简浅灰色无缝背景，呈现干净的编辑风格。中性大地色调，奢侈时尚广告风格，照片级真实感，超细腻皮肤纹理，自然妆容，焦点清晰，中景全身构图，85mm 镜头，f/4，高分辨率，高端杂志摄影。
